description: Commercial invoice buyer differs from the applicant named in the LC

expected_issues.description: Commercial invoice buyer differs from the LC applicant

false_positive_checks.description: Invoice umbrella article should stay suppressed when UCP600-18B is the actionable child rule.
Invoice issuer rule should not fire when only the buyer/applicant pairing is wrong.
Invoice currency rule should not leak into a buyer/applicant-only discrepancy.
Transport umbrella article should not leak into the invoice buyer-only case.
Insurance umbrella article should not leak into the invoice buyer-only case.
LC type uncertainty should not surface once a real documentary discrepancy is already present.
